top_signals.title: OpenAI readies IPO filing to list as soon as September
top_signals.summary: AI lab is preparing for $1tn listing with bankers Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley and lawyers at Cooley
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: OpenAI to confidentially file for IPO as soon as Friday: Source
top_signals.summary: OpenAI is working with banks including Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Weight-loss wars go global as Novo Nordisk bets big on its Wegovy pill
top_signals.summary: The weight loss pill had a strong U.S. launch this year, and Novo believes that will be replicated in other markets around the world.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
